2605.00438.title: Thinking in Text and Images: Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning Traces for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation
2605.00438.paper_summary: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires plans that are both logically coherent and geometrically grounded. Existing Vision-Language-Action policies usually hide planning in latent states or expose only one modality: text-only chain-of-thought encodes causal order but misses spatial constraints, while visual prediction provides geometric cues but often remains local and semantically underconstrained. We introduce Interleaved Vision--Language Reasoning (IVLR), a policy framework built around \trace{}, an explicit intermediate representation that alternates textual subgoals with visual keyframes over the full task horizon. At test time, a single native multimodal transformer self-generates this global semantic-geometric trace from the initial observation and instruction, caches it, and conditions a closed-loop action decoder on the trace, original instruction, and current observation. Because standard robot datasets lack such traces, we construct pseudo-supervision by temporally segmenting demonstrations and captioning each stage with a vision-language model. Across simulated benchmarks for long-horizon manipulation and visual distribution shift, \method{} reaches 95.5\% average success on LIBERO, including 92.4\% on LIBERO-Long, and 59.4\% overall success on SimplerEnv-WidowX. Ablations show that both modalities are necessary: without traces, LIBERO-Long success drops to 37.7\%; text-only and vision-only traces reach 62.0\% and 68.4\%, while the full interleaved trace reaches 92.4\%. Stress tests with execution perturbations and masked trace content show moderate degradation, suggesting that the trace can tolerate local corruption and moderate execution drift, but remains limited under stale or incorrect global plans.
2605.00438.paper_summary_zh: 長期機器人操作需要邏輯上連貫且幾何上基礎的計劃。現有的視覺-語言-行動政策通常將計劃隱藏在潛在狀態中，或僅暴露一種模態：僅文本的思考鏈編碼了因果順序，但忽略了空間限制，而視覺預測提供了幾何提示，但通常仍然是局部的且語義上不受約束。我們介紹了交錯視覺-語言推理（IVLR），這是一個圍繞 \trace{} 構建的政策框架，該框架在整個任務範圍內交替使用文本子目標和視覺關鍵幀。在測試時，單個本地多模態Transformer從初始觀察和指令自動生成這個全局語義-幾何追蹤，並將其緩存，並根據追蹤、原始指令和當前觀察條件化閉環行動解碼器。由於標準機器人數據集缺乏這樣的追蹤，我們通過時間上分段演示並用視覺-語言模型為每個階段標註來構建偽監督。在針對長期操作和視覺分佈轉移的模擬基準中，\method{} 在 LIBERO 上達到 95.5\% 的平均成功率，包括在 LIBERO-Long 上的 92.4\% 和在 SimplerEnv-WidowX 上的 59.4\% 總成功率。消融實驗顯示這兩種模態都是必要的：如果沒有追蹤，LIBERO-Long 的成功率降至 37.7\%；僅文本和僅視覺的追蹤分別達到 62.0\% 和 68.4\%，而完整的交錯追蹤達到 92.4\%。執行擾動和遮罩追蹤內容的壓力測試顯示出中等降級，這表明追蹤可以容忍局部損壞和中等執行漂移，但在過時或不正確的全局計劃下仍然有限。
2605.00438.author: Jinkun Liu et.al.
2605.00438.authors: Jinkun Liu, Haohan Chi, Lingfeng Zhang, Yifan Xie, YuAn Wang, Long Chen, Hangjun Ye, Xiaoshuai Hao, Wenbo Ding
